description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular plot featuring a manicured lawn, palm trees, and a driveway with two parked cars. The building has a flat roof, large glass windows, and a spacious wooden deck at the front, partially shaded by an umbrella. The backyard includes a small rectangular swimming pool and additional green space. The white exterior walls and clean lines emphasize a minimalist architectural style. The property is enclosed by a white picket fence with gated access at the front. Outdoor amenities such as the deck, pool, and driveway enhance the residential comfort and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, driveway, and a fenced yard with palm trees and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden deck with umbrella, driveway with two cars, and the white picket fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, deck area, and the pool at the rear right corner of the yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and the back facade with large windows and steps leading to the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, deck steps, and the side lawn with palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and sides
